summary: Markets exhibit cautious sentiment ahead of the Federal Reserve meeting on April 28-29, with precious metals and crypto drifting lower amid anticipation of interest rate decisions and liquidity impacts. Bitcoin shows strong bullish positioning far above key levels, while gold and crude oil face bearish pressures. Forex pairs like EURUSD are highlighted in pre-Fed forecasts, contributing to overall neutral-to-bearish mood in commodities.

signals.name: Bitcoin
signals.reason: DegenDave shares his exact long setup for Bitcoin, indicating a bullish trading opportunity.

signals.reason: Precious metals are opening the week with moderate downside pressure ahead of the Fed decision.
